summary: 13 snapshot workbooks; 11-phase build scaffold — AI-assisted methods is a method packet for a version-history archive of the IC Analytic Technique Compendium as it grew from a v0.1 scaffold to a v1.3 eleven-phase compendium.
final_use_case: It turns analytic methods into reusable instruments with inputs, steps, failure modes, interpretation rules, and reviewer actions.

instruments.instrument_name: 13 snapshot workbooks; 11-phase build scaffold — AI-assisted methods / Snapshot
instruments.input: project source text and the named component `Snapshot`
instruments.operation: uses `Snapshot` as a named project component with a traceable role in the public mechanism. Source context: A version-history archive of the IC Analytic Technique Compendium as it grew from a v0.1 scaffold to a v1.3 eleven-phase compendium. Each xlsx is a discrete "snapshot" workbook intended for direct import into Google Sheets.
